intentSynonyms: show me my page versions in confluence
view my page versions in confluence
see all my page versions in confluence
list page version history in confluence
description: List version history of a Confluence page. Shows who edited the page and when.

page_id.description: Page ID to list versions for

limit.description: Maximum number of versions to return (default 25, max 250)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response
